issues.description: Condition missing required deck threshold check. Text states 'If you have 20 or less cards in your deck' but DSL uses Always. Should be a TrashCount or equivalent deck-size condition.

Target scope incorrectly specified as 'ChooseOwnCharacter'. Text requires returning Character from owner's hand (not board). Scope should reflect hand selection, and maxCount should be 1 (up to 1 Character).
